title: Masky Better Clocks
description: MaskyBetterClocks is a texturepack that improves the textures of the clock in their schedules, the sun and the moon are more easily recognized.
body:
# Masky Better Clocks
The clocks are often used for decoration, but at the time of seeing the time is not well distinguishable color or time and more at night, this fixes it and improves the resourcepack with more noticeable colors.

| Version Support             |
|---------------------|
| +1.16 Support            | 

Vanilla Clocks:



![vanilla clocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce34c10b46af9629ca3f90cddfce53750caed976.png) ![vanilla clocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76c174ea83620ddc7471225fe9a018ceda5ff70d.png)

MaskyBetterClocks Vanilla:


![MBC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47366bd03d511d159521b3204074ba8ee4c1c441.png) ![MBC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0d09dfb12c8ae74d91a953cbe4bb6352187f1d3.png)
